items.name_en: 🌸 New member of the SOLFERINO box series—phone case 👓
items.name_cn:
🌸 New member of the SOLFERINO box series—phone case 👓
If you want something stylish, simple, and fail-safe, this Solferino is the perfect choice~ As the smallest member of the family, its size is just right to easily fit any size of phone, making it an ideal on-the-go essential. Love it!! Both the look and versatility are on point. Buy it!
And you can happily style it with a full leather look! This attention to detail is spot on for the current casual trend. Highly recommended~
Model: 753963
Dimensions: 18×11×5cm

items.name_en: 🌸【Original leather with magnetic box packaging】▪️ROSE▪️New Fall/Winter style, same Hobo as Korean stars!! The Y brand has finally arrived with this year's exploding trend of underarm bags!! The bag's silhouette is simple and structured, looking structured without being too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, it gives a unique aura that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.

items.name_cn:
Black Caviar Embroidery·
Y Large Caviar Cowhide Tote/Shopping Bag
The iconic LOGO becomes a modern code. Continuing the legacy of classics, writing a new chapter of inspiration with bold embossing to embrace diverse postures. Extra-large capacity, fits iPad and laptop, perfect for spring/summer travel. Retro minimalist design, great for styling, stylish and photogenic. A hot pick recommended by Ins bloggers~ Really amazing!
Style No.: 668900
Size: 33×22×15

items.name_cn:
Black Black Buckle Crocodile·
Niki Shopping Bag_
Imported Italian crocodile embossed calfskin, with hardware fully wrapped in leather for exquisite craftsmanship! The bag features a magnetic snap in the middle for security; the interior has a zipper pocket and open slots for phones and cards, making items easy to find despite the large size. The bag is very lightweight yet has ample capacity, easily switching between briefcase, travel bag, shopping bag, or diaper bag. Extremely practical!
Model No.: 577999
Size: 33x27x11.5cm

items.name_cn:
▪️ Mini Toy Shopping▪️
New Mini Tote Shopping Bag, small but surprisingly spacious! No extra compartments inside for personalized storage. Made from original factory plain calfskin, though plain calfskin is often thought to be stiff, this one is surprisingly soft, giving the bag a particularly high-end texture! No large logo, just a small and exquisite YSL charm and a row of brand engraved gold foil! Perfect for you who are low-key and sophisticated!
Model No.: 712367
Size: 18x17x8cm

items.name_cn:
💰Suede Edition·
Jamie 4.3 Large POCHON_Tote Bag
Imported Italian soft suede paired with cowhide. The drawstring design creates a natural, high-end wrinkled texture on the bag. The metal chain and logo on the body complement each other perfectly. It gives off a relaxed, stylish vibe. The tote shape is unique and expressive! Extra-large capacity, fits a laptop 💻.
Model: 809824
Size: 27×34×3cm

items.name_cn:
【Original Leather】
A new minimalist bucket bag featuring imported lambskin drawstrings and a signature logo. Large capacity design combining style and practicality. Very spacious. The smooth lambskin texture feels premium. Includes a detachable pouch. Adjustable shoulder strap allows you to switch between a shoulder bag and a crossbody bag. Perfect for various daily occasions. Full of dimensionality. Perfectly interprets understated minimalism~
Model: 804302
Size: 24×30×12cm
